task_completion.description: Navigate to create a new Activity log in farmOS Field Kit
task_completion.visual_evidence: The farmOS Field Kit app is open and displaying a new Activity log creation form.
The date field in the form is set to January 6, 2025 (or 2025-01-06).
The quantity field contains the number 24.
The unit field contains the word 'head'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required grazing rotation notes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The notes or description field contains the text detailing the rotational grazing move, including references to North Pasture A, South Pasture B, forage heights, and dates.
The log is saved, indicated by a success message, a checkmark, or the app returning to the log list view with the newly created Activity log visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the farmOS Field Kit app
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual farmOS Field Kit application interface, not a generic text editor, notes app, or unrelated web browser.

integrity.description: Verify no terminal commands were used to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or scripts visible that are being used to inject data directly into the backend or database.

integrity.description: Verify genuine interaction with form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the agent actively interacting with the form fields, such as typing text, opening dropdowns, or clicking buttons within the app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Date: 2025-01-06. Expected Quantity: 24. Expected Unit: head. Required phrases in notes: 'North Pasture A', 'South Pasture B', 'residual forage height: 3 inches', 'entry: 8 inches', '14 grazing days', 'January 20, 2025'.
